name: SCAMPER
what_it_is: A structured ideation checklist - Substitute, Combine, Adapt, Modify/Magnify, Put to other uses, Eliminate, Reverse/Rearrange - applied to an existing idea to generate variations.
core_mechanic: Take the existing idea. Run it through each SCAMPER prompt. Generate at least one response per prompt. Most outputs will be unusable - that's fine. Escape the gravitational pull of the obvious solution.
when_to_use: Ideation on an existing concept needing variation or improvement / Team converging on one obvious solution too quickly / Looking for differentiation when obvious options are already taken
when_not_to_use: No starting concept to SCAMPER from / The problem requires first-principles thinking not variation on existing
ideaos_application: Agent 3 runs the input concept through all 7 prompts, selects the 2 most interesting outputs, develops each one level further.
